PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?song ?songLabel WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q7366 .
  ?song p:P1066 ?peakStatement .
  ?peakStatement ps:P1066 ?peakPosition ; pq:P585 ?peakDate .
  FILTER(?peakPosition <= 100)
  FILTER(YEAR(?peakDate) = 2020) MINUS {
    ?song wdt:P175 wd:Q51120673 .
  }
  ?song wdt:P175 ?performer1 .
  ?song wdt:P175 ?performer2 .
  FILTER(?performer1 != ?performer2)
  ?song rdfs:label ?songLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?songLabel) = "en")
}
LIMIT 20
